scripts.test:all: npm run build:wasm && node dist/compression-eac-smoke.cjs && node dist/compression-manager-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwdebug-core-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwdebug-profile-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-base64-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-crc-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-file-core-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-file-ini-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-mixfile-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-thread-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-legacy-platform-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-containers-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-fixed-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-hash-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-image-misc-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-lzo-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-md5-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-platform-compat-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-public-key-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-ramfile-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-sha-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-stream-core-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-string-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-surface-core-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwlib-utility-core-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwmath-core-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwmath-curves-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwmath-lookup-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwsaveload-full-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwutil-smoke.cjs && node dist/wwdownload-smoke.cjs && node dist/gameengine-header-case-smoke.cjs && node dist/w3d-device-utility-smoke.cjs && node dist/gameengine-common-core-smoke.cjs && node dist/gamenetwork-core-smoke.cjs && node dist/gamenetwork-download-manager-smoke.cjs && node dist/gameclient-utility-smoke.cjs && node dist/win32-mouse-smoke.cjs && EXPECT_WASM=1 node harness/smoke.mjs
scripts.test:real-big: npm run build:wasm && npm run verify:assets && node tools/run_real_big_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/INIZH.big
scripts.test:real-big-browser: npm run build:wasm && npm run verify:assets && node harness/real_big_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets/INIZH.big
scripts.test:runtime-archives-browser: npm run build:wasm && npm run extract:runtime-archives && node harness/runtime_archives_smoke.mjs artifacts/real-assets
scripts.test:wasm: npm run build:wasm && EXPECT_WASM=1 node harness/smoke.mjs
